title: CUB Banking Redesign
subtitle: Innovating digital banking for India's evolving financial landscape.
problem_statement: Existing CUB app offers standard features. Market demands hyper-personalized, proactive financial management beyond basic transactions.

pillars.title: Financial Anxiety
pillars.insight: Users worry about managing daily expenses and future savings.

pillars.title: Digital Literacy
pillars.insight: Varying tech comfort requires intuitive, simple interfaces.

pillars.title: Time Scarcity
pillars.insight: Busy lives demand quick, efficient banking interactions.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we make CUB banking truly indispensable?
How might users achieve financial wellness effortlessly?
How might we integrate proactive financial guidance?
How might we gamify savings and investments?

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need smart tools to manage my family's finances.
personas.bio: Tech-savvy professional seeking efficient ways to track spending and invest for future goals.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: I want to save more without feeling restricted.
personas.bio: Ambitious young professional focused on career growth and building financial independence.

insights: "My bank app is just for transactions."
"I wish I knew where my money goes."
"Am I saving enough for my future?"
"This app could do so much more for me."

points.benefit: Offers immediate value, not just a label.

points.action: Integrate bill pay with smart reminders and auto-pay options.
points.benefit: Reduces user effort, improves financial discipline.

points.action: Adapt gamification from fitness apps for savings goals.

pivot.before: CUB app is a functional portal for basic banking transactions.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from reactive transaction processing to proactive, intelligent financial guidance and empowerment.
pivot.after: CUB becomes an indispensable financial wellness companion, anticipating user needs.

annotations.title: Smart Insights
annotations.rationale: Replaces 'Daily Expense' with actionable spending analysis.

annotations.title: Goal Tracker
annotations.rationale: Visual progress for savings/investments, driving engagement.

annotations.title: Proactive Nudge
annotations.rationale: Contextual alerts for bills, savings, or investment opportunities.

data.finding: Balance masked by default, requires extra tap.
Iconography in 'At your Fingertips' section is inconsistent.
Disabled 'Pay' button is clear, but could offer guidance.
Limited customization options for dashboard layout.
